meaning: n.亡命徒,喝彩int.好啊!妙!vt.喝彩
examples: No one knew it, however, least of all the Manager, who, cracking his whip, cried out, "Bravo, Pinocchio!"
Bravo company has suffered a staggering 28 casualties in two months, though luckily nobody has been killed.
Howard Hawks hit paydirt with "Rio Bravo."
Her most dramatic effort: hijacking Peabody-winning fashion competition series Project Runway from rival Bravo.
Non-terrestrial channels shortlisted are: E4, Sky News, Sky One, UK Style, The Discovery Channel and Bravo.
